summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, labels, comments, fix PRs, or close actions are planned. Open PRs are kept for maintainer or proof follow-up; already closed PRs are recorded as skipped; the linked security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Draft stacked maintainer migration work with an explicit open design decision needs maintainer judgment; no close or merge-style action is safe in this inventory shard.
This is a plausible narrow fix for the related fal issue, but merge/fix/close are blocked by job permissions and inventory scope.
The PR is related to open issue #92013, but product decision and proof/check failures block merge or closeout.
Broad plugin/exec context API change with compatibility/session-state/security-boundary risk and failing checks needs maintainer technical judgment.
Keep as a non-security related alternative to the quarantined Windows shim PR; merge is blocked by job permissions and mixed check/review state.
Already closed in live state; no mutation is valid or needed.
Comment-only advisory wording may be acceptable, but maintainer rebase signal plus proof failure make final disposition a maintainer judgment.
Active author follow-up plus cross-cutting Telegram/session/message-delivery changes require maintainer judgment; no close or merge action is safe.
Already closed as fixed on main by prior ClawSweeper closeout; no mutation is valid or needed.
Plausible gateway compatibility fix, but proof/check failures and no merge/fix permission require non-mutating retention.
Security-sensitive linked ref must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated non-security PR classifications.
